title: The beginning of the end of physical media
description: Christina Warren discusses the end of Netflix's DVD rental service, the decline of physical media, how streaming replaced home video access, and the loss of special features like director's commentaries and behind-the-scenes content.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
